news.title: Taiwan PMIC maker Global Mixed-mode to raise prices as chip shortages persist
news.description: Taiwanese power management IC supplier Global Mixed-mode Technology (GMT) will follow peers in seeking price increases from customers as tight chip supply continues to reshape capacity allocation across the industry.

news.title: 'Too lazy': NVIDIA's Jensen Huang says CEOs use AI as cover story for layoffs that has nothing to do with it
